channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 11A: delays
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic accident. [On 20.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic accident.
[On 20.06.2026]

item.title: 49: Harmful passenger car
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 20.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 20.06.2026]

item.title: 69A: foreign traffic accident
item.description: The line 69A is redirected towards Hauptbahnhof S U between Geiselbergstraße S and Hauptbahnhof S U via Gudrunstraße. [On 20.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The line 69A is redirected towards Hauptbahnhof S U between Geiselbergstraße S and Hauptbahnhof S U via Gudrunstraße.
[On 20.06.2026]

item.title: REX 3: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Wien Jedlersdorf / Wien HauptbahnhofX ↔X Deutsch Wagram
item.description: Due to construction works, between Wien Floridsdorf Station (U) and Wien Jedlersdorf Bahnhst, Wien Süßenbrunn Bahnhst and Gerasdorf b. Vienna Bahnhst from 1008.2026 to … [Since 19.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, between Wien Floridsdorf Station (U) and Wien Jedlersdorf Bahnhst, Wien Süßenbrunn Bahnhst and Gerasdorf b. Vienna Bahnhst from 1008.2026 to …
[Since 19.06.2026]

item.title: Wien Westbahnhof: Mariahilfer road from Europaplatz and Mariahilfer Gürtel to Palmgasse and Gerstnerstraße
item.description: The actual area of Mariahilfer Straße is to be closed for vehicle traffic. [25.05.2026 – 25.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The actual area of Mariahilfer Straße is to be closed for vehicle traffic.
[25.05.2026 – 25.06.2026]

item.title: Neilreichgasse from Gudrunstraße to Davidgasse
item.description: Access to the approved pitches is possible.The bus line 7A is redirected over this period via the Rothenhofgasse Sonnleithengasse - Davidgasse. [22.06.2026 – 13.10.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Access to the approved pitches is possible.The bus line 7A is redirected over this period via the Rothenhofgasse Sonnleithengasse - Davidgasse.
[22.06.2026 – 13.10.2026]

item.title: N20: construction works Fatty-George-Gasse
item.description: Because of construction works in the Fatty-George-Gasse area, line N20 is being redirected Monday - Friday. [08.07.2026 – 18.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Fatty-George-Gasse area, line N20 is being redirected Monday - Friday.
[08.07.2026 – 18.06.2027]

item.title: 99A/99B: construction works Fatty-George-Gasse
item.description: Due to construction works in the Fatty-George-Gasse, the lines 99A and 99B will be redirected. Period: Tuesday, July 07, 2026, around 08:00 a.m. to about nine weeks. [07.07.2026 – 18.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works in the Fatty-George-Gasse, the lines 99A and 99B will be redirected. Period: Tuesday, July 07, 2026, around 08:00 a.m. to about nine weeks.
[07.07.2026 – 18.06.2027]

item.title: 93A/98A: construction works Oberdorfstraße
item.description: Due to roadworks in the Oberdorfstraße and the associated prov. one-way guide from Langobardenstraße to Aspernstraße, the buses are redirected. [18.06.2026 – 18.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to roadworks in the Oberdorfstraße and the associated prov. one-way guide from Langobardenstraße to Aspernstraße, the buses are redirected.
[18.06.2026 – 18.06.2027]
